summary: Iteration 53: Tested Programs Hub changes (single merged table, non-tiered first, Pricing/Tiers toggles), Pricing Hub updates (plain text inputs, updated labels), Homepage flagship cards (UpcomingCard for is_upcoming=true, SimpleFlagshipCard with purple button for non-upcoming), Program detail page show_pricing/show_tiers toggles, and Sponsor A Life nav link. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test notify-me subscriber created via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified all requested features: (1) Programs Hub shows single merged table with non-tiered programs first (Quad Layer, Trauma Clearing), tiered below, with Pricing and Tiers toggle columns, Status dropdown with Open/Closed/Coming Soon options, no Group toggle column. (2) Pricing Hub has plain text inputs (no number spinners), description says 'Prices shown here apply to both homepage cards and program detail pages'. (3) Homepage flagship section: programs with is_upcoming=true use UpcomingCard style (dates, countdown, pricing, enroll), non-upcoming flagships use SimpleFlagshipCard with purple 'Know More' button (bg-purple-600). (4) Sponsor A Life nav link correctly points to /sponsor. (5) Program detail page respects show_pricing_on_card and show_tiers_on_card toggles - shows 'Express Your Interest' when pricing off.

verified: All programs in one table
Non-tiered programs (Quad Layer, Trauma Clearing) shown first
Tiered programs shown below non-tiered
No 'Group' toggle column
Pricing and Tiers toggle columns present
Status dropdown has Open/Closed/Coming Soon options
Save All button functional
No number spinners (input type='text')
Description: 'Prices shown here apply to both homepage cards and program detail pages'
Programs section lists all non-group programs
Group Programs section shows message when no group programs
Flagship programs with is_upcoming=true use UpcomingCard style (dates, countdown, pricing, enroll)
Flagship programs without is_upcoming use SimpleFlagshipCard with purple Know More button
Purple button class: bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700
Found 2 purple Know More buttons for non-upcoming flagships
Found 2 UpcomingCard style cards
Sponsor A Life nav link visible in header
Clicking navigates to /sponsor page correctly
When show_pricing_on_card=false: shows 'Express Your Interest' button instead of pricing/tiers
When show_pricing_on_card=true: shows tier cards with prices and 'Enroll' buttons
When show_tiers_on_card=false: tier section is hidden
When show_tiers_on_card=true: tier section shows tier cards
POST /api/notify-me creates subscription
GET /api/notify-me returns all subscribers
